common.title: Calculators
common.hero_description: Online calculators for finance, business and health. Quickly calculate important metrics.
common.seo_description: Our website offers convenient online calculators for various fields: finance, business and health. Use tools for free and get accurate results in seconds.
common.footer_text: CalcSite — all calculators for your tasks

deposit.title: Deposit Calculator
deposit.description: Calculate the return on a deposit with interest capitalization.

inflation.title: Inflation Calculator
inflation.description: Calculate how the purchasing power of money changes over time.

investment-return.title: Investment Return Calculator
investment-return.description: Calculate the future value of your investments.

cpa.title: CPA (Cost per Action)
cpa.description: Calculate the cost per action (lead, sale).

markup.title: Markup
markup.description: Calculate the markup percentage based on cost.

ltv.title: LTV (Customer Lifetime Value)
ltv.description: Calculate the lifetime value of a customer.

bmi.title: BMI Calculator
bmi.description: Calculate your Body Mass Index and check if your weight is normal.

calories.title: Daily Calorie Intake
calories.description: Find out how many calories you need per day to maintain your weight.

calories-for-weight-loss.title: Calories for Weight Loss
calories-for-weight-loss.description: Calculate your daily calorie intake for weight loss.

ideal-weight.title: Ideal Weight by Height
ideal-weight.description: Determine the ideal weight for your desired BMI.

body-fat.title: Body Fat Percentage
body-fat.description: Estimate your body fat percentage based on BMI and age.

water-intake.title: Daily Water Intake
water-intake.description: Calculate how much water you should drink per day.

compound-interest.title: Compound Interest Calculator
compound-interest.description: Calculate the future value of an investment with reinvested interest.

percentage-calculator.title: Percentage Calculator
percentage-calculator.description: Calculate percentage of a number, or what percent one number is of another.

loan-overpayment.title: Loan Overpayment Calculator
loan-overpayment.description: Calculate the total overpayment on a loan.

early-repayment.title: Early Loan Repayment Calculator
early-repayment.description: Calculate new payment amount or reduced term after early repayment.

tax-calculator.title: Tax Calculator (Income/Salary)
tax-calculator.description: Calculate personal income tax and net amount.

vat-calculator.title: VAT Calculator
vat-calculator.description: Add or remove VAT from an amount.

tdee.title: TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure)
tdee.description: Calculate your daily calorie needs based on activity.

body-fat-advanced.title: Advanced Body Fat Calculator
body-fat-advanced.description: Estimate body fat percentage using multiple measurements.

heart-rate-zones.title: Heart Rate Zones Calculator
heart-rate-zones.description: Calculate your heart rate zones for training.

food-calories.title: Food Calorie Calculator
food-calories.description: Estimate the calorie content of a meal by its composition.

concrete.title: Concrete Calculator
concrete.description: Calculate concrete volume for foundations, slabs, screeds.

brick.title: Brick Calculator
brick.description: Calculate the number of bricks for a wall.

lumber.title: Lumber Calculator
lumber.description: Calculate volume and quantity of boards.

foundation.title: Foundation Calculator
foundation.description: Calculate concrete volume and reinforcement for strip foundation.

blocks.title: Block Calculator (Aerated / Foam)
blocks.description: Calculate the number of blocks for walls.

tile.title: Tile Calculator
tile.description: Calculate the number of tiles for floors and walls.

screed.title: Floor Screed Calculator
screed.description: Calculate the volume of mixture for floor screed.

insulation.title: Insulation Calculator
insulation.description: Calculate the amount of insulation (m², m³).

paint.title: Paint Calculator
paint.description: Calculate paint consumption based on area.

wallpaper.title: Wallpaper Calculator
wallpaper.description: Calculate the number of wallpaper rolls.

plaster.title: Plaster Calculator
plaster.description: Calculate the volume of plaster mixture.
